headline: Is Linde plc (LIN) A Good Stock To Buy?
summary: Is LIN a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Linde plc on Ocular Capital’s Substack. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on LIN. Linde plc’s share was trading at $481.55 as of March 11th. LIN’s trailing and forward P/E were 32.96 and 26.88, respectively according to Yahoo Finance. Linde plc […]
